Uses of Annotation Interface
org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.Bean

Packages that use Bean
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.commons.inject
Lightweight bean lookup, contribution, and injection support for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.microservice.jetty
Microservice API
org.apache.juneau.microservice.test
JUnit 5 whole-microservice integration-test support — the @SpringBootTest analog for the standalone Juneau microservice.
org.apache.juneau.microservice.tomcat
Embedded Tomcat integration for Juneau microservices.
org.apache.juneau.petstore.jetty
Apache Juneau Petstore - Jetty/Microservice deployment.
org.apache.juneau.petstore.rest
Petstore REST resources.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.springboot
Spring Boot Integration
org.apache.juneau.server.config
Server Configuration Repository

  • Uses of Bean in org.apache.juneau.commons.inject

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Bean
    BeanAnnotation.DEFAULT
    Default value
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.inject that return Bean
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Bean
    BeanAnnotation.Builder.build()
    Instantiates a new @Bean object initialized with this builder.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.inject with parameters of type Bean
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static String
    BeanAnnotation.name(Bean a)
    Pulls the name/value attribute from a Bean annotation.

  • Uses of Bean in org.apache.juneau.microservice.jetty

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.microservice.jetty with annotations of type Bean
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    jakarta.servlet.Servlet
    HealthProbeConfiguration.healthProbeServlet()
    Probe servlet bean discovered by JettyServerComponent.
    HealthProbeSettings
    HealthProbeConfiguration.healthProbeSettings()
    Default probe settings bean.
    JettyServerComponent
    JettyConfiguration.jettyServerComponent()
    Contributes the JettyServerComponent bean under its own type for direct lookup by external callers.
    JettyServerFactory
    JettyConfiguration.jettyServerFactory()
    Contributes the default Jetty server factory used to build the Server from a jetty.xml file.
    MicroserviceListener
    JettyConfiguration.jettyServerListener()
    Contributes the same JettyServerComponent instance under MicroserviceListener (named jettyServerListener) so it participates in the Microservice.start() / Microservice.stop() fan-out without clobbering any user-supplied unnamed MicroserviceListener.
    JettySettings
    JettyConfiguration.jettySettings()
    Contributes an empty default JettySettings so JettyServerComponent always finds one in the store.

  • Uses of Bean in org.apache.juneau.microservice.test

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.microservice.test with annotations of type Bean
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.eclipse.jetty.server.Server
    EphemeralJettyServerConfig.jettyServer()
    Provides the bean-supplied Jetty Server that JettyServerComponent consumes during onStart().
    JettySettings
    EphemeralJettyServerConfig.jettySettings()
    Disables the 30s graceful-shutdown drain wait for integration tests.

  • Uses of Bean in org.apache.juneau.microservice.tomcat

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.microservice.tomcat with annotations of type Bean
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TomcatServerComponent
    TomcatConfiguration.tomcatServerComponent()
    Contributes the TomcatServerComponent bean under its own type for direct lookup by external callers.
    TomcatServerFactory
    TomcatConfiguration.tomcatServerFactory()
    Contributes the default Tomcat server factory used to build the Tomcat instance.
    MicroserviceListener
    TomcatConfiguration.tomcatServerListener()
    Contributes the same TomcatServerComponent instance under MicroserviceListener (named tomcatServerListener) so it participates in the Microservice.start() / Microservice.stop() fan-out without clobbering any user-supplied unnamed MicroserviceListener.
    TomcatSettings
    TomcatConfiguration.tomcatSettings()
    Contributes an empty default TomcatSettings so TomcatServerComponent always finds one in the store.

  • Uses of Bean in org.apache.juneau.petstore.jetty

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.petstore.jetty with annotations of type Bean
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    jakarta.servlet.Servlet
    App.AppConfig.rootResources()
    Provides the top-level REST servlet, auto-mounted by JettyServerComponent at Rest.path().

  • Uses of Bean in org.apache.juneau.petstore.rest

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.petstore.rest with annotations of type Bean
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FreemarkerMixin
    PetFreemarkerViewResource.freemarker()
    Provides a FreemarkerMixin configured to resolve templates under petstore-templates/.
    RestGuardList
    PetSecureResource.guards(BeanStore bs)
    Provides the RestGuardList that gates every op on this resource with a BearerTokenGuard — fail-closed bearer-token enforcement.
    MustacheMixin
    PetMustacheViewResource.mustache()
    Provides a MustacheMixin configured to resolve templates under petstore-templates/ with an implicit .mustache suffix — so MustacheView.of("pet") resolves to the classpath resource petstore-templates/pet.mustache.

  • Uses of Bean in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.springboot

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.springboot with annotations of type Bean
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    WritableBeanStore
    SpringRestServlet.createBeanStore(Optional<BeanStore> parent)
    Hook into Spring bean injection framework.

  • Uses of Bean in org.apache.juneau.server.config

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.server.config with annotations of type Bean
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    jakarta.servlet.Servlet
    App.AppConfig.loadConfigResource()
    Provides the LoadConfigResource REST servlet, auto-mounted by JettyServerComponent at Rest.path().
